prompt.content: A figure is transformed using a rigid motion. Which statement must be true?

choices.content: The image has the same side lengths and angle measures as the original figure.
The image is larger than the original figure.
The image must be in the exact same location as the original figure.
The image has the same area but a different shape.

steps.content: Rigid motions preserve distances and angle measures. Therefore, the image has the same size and shape as the original figure.
